text: Apollo 11 lands the first humans on the Moon
The Sydney Opera House officially opens
The Rubik's Cube is invented
Microsoft is founded
Apple is founded
Star Wars is released in cinemas
The Sony Walkman goes on sale
John Lennon is shot in New York
MTV launches and airs its first music video
The IBM Personal Computer is released
Michael Jackson's album Thriller is released
Apple launches the Macintosh
Live Aid is broadcast around the world
Back to the Future is released
The Chernobyl nuclear disaster
The Space Shuttle Challenger disaster
The Berlin Wall falls
The Simpsons airs its first full episode
Nintendo releases the Game Boy
The Hubble Space Telescope is launched
Nelson Mandela is released from prison
The World Wide Web is made public
The Soviet Union is dissolved
Amazon is founded
Nelson Mandela is elected President of South Africa
Sony releases the first PlayStation in Japan
Windows 95 is released
eBay is founded
Dolly the sheep is cloned
Princess Diana dies in Paris
The first Harry Potter book is published
The film Titanic is released
Google is founded
The euro is introduced as an electronic currency
The Sydney Summer Olympics
Wikipedia launches
Apple releases the first iPod
Euro notes and coins enter circulation
Concorde makes its final commercial flight
Facebook launches
The Indian Ocean earthquake and tsunami
YouTube is founded
The first iPhone goes on sale
The collapse of Lehman Brothers
Bitcoin is launched
Instagram launches
Apple releases the first iPad
The wedding of Prince William and Catherine Middleton
The London Summer Olympics
NASA's Curiosity rover lands on Mars
The United Kingdom votes to leave the European Union
Pokémon Go is released
Notre-Dame cathedral is damaged by fire
The World Health Organization declares COVID-19 a pandemic
Queen Elizabeth II dies
The first images from the James Webb Space Telescope are released

Toy Story, the first fully computer-animated film, is released
The Spice Girls release their debut single Wannabe
Tim Berners-Lee proposes the World Wide Web at CERN

The first text message (SMS) is sent
